evidence_basis: newly generated conversational OCS replay artifacts
live bounded probe against the same replayed provider request

determinations.ROOT_CAUSE: fixed 20 second non-streaming OpenAI HTTP read timeout is too low for the OCS cognition request
determinations.MINIMAL_SAFE_FIX: use an explicit bounded OCS OpenAI timeout above the observed response boundary and preserve fail-closed replay evidence
determinations.EXPECTED_RESULT_AFTER_FIX: TimeoutError should be eliminated; response-size guard must still be addressed for full end-to-end success

known_next_blocker.failure_reason: OpenAI provider response exceeds bounded size

certification_statement: The timeout root cause is certified as a fixed default timeout mismatch for the conversational OCS OpenAI workload. This certification does not certify a runtime fix or production readiness.
